name: Morse vs. Horse
short_description: Deliver messages between ancient cities in morse code, in a battle against horses, cars, trains... and more! Start out by learning letters, then build up your skills until you can write full sentences, with numbers and punctuation. Officially self-approved best game in history.
detailed_description:
Lore

Travel back in time on a mission from the Morse Gods, to prove that Morse is, and always will be, the ultimate method of communication. Compete against inferior forms of communication: horse, car, train, and a guy running really fast.

Gameplay

  • Transmit messages using authentic morse code.

  • Race against other forms of communication.

  • Pick up the skill of morse code while playing.

Content

  • 36 hand-made levels, designed to challenge you on speed, tactics and accuracy.

  • 4 different maps: Ancient Arabia, Medieval England, 1850s USA, and Industrial England.

  • Built-in level editor, and fan-made levels (using the Steam Workshop).

  • Endless modes, to test your skills even further.

  • Selection of difficulties to increase your suffering.
